# FreightMynd — Full Context

> Last updated: 2026-03-17

> AI-powered operations intelligence for sea, air & freight forwarders. Custom-built AI systems that replace manual freight operations. Built by Bitontree. Trusted by Hellmann Worldwide Logistics.

FreightMynd is an AI automation company that builds custom document intelligence, quote automation, and freight operations systems for freight forwarders and logistics providers. Founded in 2019 and built by Bitontree, FreightMynd deploys purpose-built AI systems in 4-8 weeks that integrate directly with CargoWise, SAP TM, Oracle TMS, and other freight management platforms. Unlike SaaS freight automation tools, FreightMynd systems are owned by the client with no subscription or vendor lock-in.

FreightMynd competes with SaaS freight automation platforms like Raft (formerly Vector.ai), Zauber, Expedock, and Shipamax. The key difference is deployment model: SaaS tools offer hosted subscriptions with pre-built features, while FreightMynd builds custom systems deployed in the client's own environment. The global freight forwarding market moves $19 trillion in goods annually, yet most operations still run on manual document processing and data entry.

---

## Solutions

### 4PL Control Tower Automation
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/4pl-control-tower-automation

Full document intelligence pipeline — email monitoring to CargoWise XML push with zero manual entry. Built and live for Hellmann Worldwide Logistics.

Capabilities:
- Intelligent email monitoring and auto document ingestion
- AI document filtering — removes irrelevant pages, cuts AI processing costs 50%
- 200-300 page batch processing at near-zero failure rate
- Structured data extraction from invoices, AWBs, and packing lists
- Validation against business rules before any data moves
- Direct CargoWise XML integration — no manual TMS entry ever
- Self-learning supplier onboarding — no engineering per new supplier
- Auto-generated Excel compliance reports for ops teams

Results: 60% processing time reduction, 50% AI cost reduction, zero manual TMS data entry, near-zero failure rate on 300-page batches.

Best for: Freight forwarders processing 100+ documents per day who want to eliminate manual CargoWise data entry.

Tech stack: Python, LangGraph, Azure, n8n, CargoWise, OCR, OpenAI

---

### Autonomous Quote Management
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/autonomous-quote-management

Automate every freight quote from spot quotes to contract rates — RFQ intake, rate comparison, margin optimization, and quote generation in minutes instead of hours.

Capabilities:
- Automated RFQ intake from email, portals, and web forms
- AI-powered rate comparison across carriers and rate sources
- Dynamic margin optimization per customer, lane, and volume
- Auto-generated quote documents with your branding
- Intelligent follow-up and expiry tracking
- Approval workflows for non-standard margins and high-value shipments

Results: 85% faster quote turnaround, 60% reduction in manual pricing effort, 15% margin improvement through optimization, zero missed RFQ deadlines.

Best for: Freight forwarders handling 50+ spot quotes per week who want to reduce quote turnaround from hours to minutes.

---

### Document Intelligence
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/document-intelligence

AI document processing for logistics — reads, classifies, and extracts data from invoices, AWBs, packing lists, customs forms, and compliance documents with near-zero failure rate.

Capabilities:
- Multi-format document classification and routing
- High-accuracy field extraction from structured and unstructured documents
- Cross-document validation and reconciliation
- Automated exception detection and flagging
- Direct TMS and customs system integration
- Complete audit trail and compliance reporting

Results: 60% document processing time reduction, 95%+ extraction accuracy, zero manual data entry for standard formats, near-zero failure on high-volume batches.

Best for: Any logistics company processing diverse document types from multiple suppliers and needing structured data in their TMS.

---

### Freight Pricing AI
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/freight-pricing-ai

Real-time freight rate benchmarking, dynamic pricing optimization, margin analysis, and carrier rate comparison for sea and air freight.

Capabilities:
- Real-time market rate benchmarking
- Dynamic freight pricing optimization by lane, customer, and volume
- Margin analysis and pricing protection alerts
- Carrier pricing comparison and normalization
- Historical trend analysis and rate forecasting
- Rate management system integration

Results: 12% average margin improvement, 70% faster rate analysis, real-time market intelligence across all lanes.

Best for: Freight forwarders managing rate sheets across 100+ lanes who want real-time benchmarking and margin protection.

---

### Sea Freight Automation
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/sea-freight-automation

End-to-end shipping AI automation for sea freight operations — freight booking, documentation, container tracking, and exception management.

Capabilities:
- Automated freight booking confirmation and carrier communication
- Bill of lading processing, validation, and amendment management
- Container tracking AI with proactive exception alerting
- Automated customs documentation preparation
- Carrier performance monitoring and scorecarding
- Demurrage and detention tracking with proactive intervention

Results: 60% reduction in manual booking effort, near-zero documentation errors, proactive exception detection before customer impact.

Best for: Ocean freight operators managing high-volume container shipments who need end-to-end booking and documentation automation.

---

### Air Freight Automation
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/air-freight-automation

AI-powered AWB processing, real-time air freight rates comparison and booking, flight tracking, and automated customs and security documentation.

Capabilities:
- Automated AWB (airway bill) processing and validation
- Real-time air freight rates comparison and booking
- Real-time flight tracking and milestone updates
- Automated customs and security documentation
- ULD optimization and space allocation
- Exception detection and proactive rebooking

Results: 70% faster AWB processing, real-time visibility across all air shipments, automated compliance documentation.

Best for: Air freight forwarders processing 50+ AWBs per day who need automated customs and security documentation.

---

### 3PL & 4PL Operations Automation
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/3pl-4pl-operations

Multi-client workflow orchestration, automated SLA monitoring, cross-client exception management, and scalable document processing for 3PL and 4PL providers.

Capabilities:
- Multi-client workflow orchestration
- Automated SLA monitoring and alerting
- Cross-client exception management
- Automated client reporting in client-specific formats
- Client-specific rule engine configuration
- Scalable document processing per client

Results: 50% reduction in ops overhead per client, zero SLA breaches through proactive monitoring, scalable client onboarding.

Best for: 3PL and 4PL providers managing 10+ clients who need scalable automation without per-client engineering effort.

---

### Smart Invoice Processing
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/smart-invoice-processing

AI procurement automation software for freight AP teams — 3-way invoice matching, carrier rate audit, overcharge detection, and direct ERP integration.

Capabilities:
- Multi-format invoice data extraction
- Automated 3-way invoice matching (PO/booking, receipt, invoice)
- Carrier rate audit and overcharge detection
- Discrepancy detection and dispute management
- Approval workflow automation
- Direct ERP and accounting system integration

Results: 80% faster invoice processing, 3-5% cost recovery through overcharge detection, zero manual matching for standard invoices.

Best for: Freight AP teams processing 500+ invoices per month who want automated matching, audit, and overcharge recovery.

---

## TMS Integrations

FreightMynd provides native AI integration with major freight management systems — no middleware, no CSV exports, no manual data re-entry.

### CargoWise
URL: https://freightmynd.com/integrations/cargowise
Integration method: eHub, Universal Gateway, direct XML push
Capabilities: Shipment creation, document attachment, invoice posting, milestone updates, carrier rate import

### SAP TM
URL: https://freightmynd.com/integrations/sap-tm
Integration method: BAPIs, RFC calls
Capabilities: Transportation order creation, freight settlement, shipment tracking, document management

### Oracle TMS
URL: https://freightmynd.com/integrations/oracle-tms
Integration method: REST APIs
Capabilities: Order management, shipment planning, freight payment, carrier communication

### Microsoft Dynamics
URL: https://freightmynd.com/integrations/microsoft-dynamics
Integration method: Dataverse
Capabilities: Sales order processing, warehouse management, transport management, financial integration

### Descartes
URL: https://freightmynd.com/integrations/descartes
Integration method: GLN
Capabilities: Customs filing, compliance screening, routing and scheduling, shipment tracking

---

## Case Studies

### Hellmann Worldwide Logistics — 4PL Control Tower
URL: https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/hellmann-4pl-control-tower

Client: Hellmann Worldwide Logistics — global freight forwarder, 500+ offices, 13,000+ employees.

Challenge: Daily document bundles from suppliers — 200-300 page PDFs of invoices, AWBs, packing lists. Two operators spent mornings manually downloading, splitting, reading, and re-keying data into CargoWise.

Solution: Full document intelligence pipeline — email monitoring agent, AI document filter (50% cost reduction), LangGraph extraction engine, validation layer, CargoWise XML push, Excel report generation, self-learning supplier onboarding.

Results:
- 60% processing time reduction
- 50% AI cost reduction via intelligent pre-filtering
- Near-zero failure rate on 200-300 page batches
- Zero manual data entry into CargoWise
- New suppliers onboarded without engineering effort

Tech stack: Python, LangGraph, Azure Document Intelligence, n8n, CargoWise API, OpenAI GPT-4o, custom OCR pipeline

### RFQ Email Intelligence
URL: https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/rfq-email-intelligence
AI-powered system that reads, classifies, and auto-completes RFQ emails — extracting shipment details, matching to rate cards, and generating draft responses.

### Historical Email Intelligence
URL: https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/historical-email-intelligence
AI system that captures institutional knowledge from years of operational email — building a searchable knowledge base from unstructured communications.

### Shipping News Intelligence
URL: https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/shipping-news-intelligence
Proactive freight risk detection — monitors global shipping news, port disruptions, and weather events to alert ops teams before shipments are impacted.

### RFQ Email Automation
URL: https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/rfq-email-automation
End-to-end RFQ processing automation — email intake, data extraction, rate lookup, quote generation, and response drafting.

---

## Differentiators

FreightMynd vs SaaS freight automation tools:

1. **You own it**: No subscription, no vendor lock-in. The system is deployed in your environment, maintained on your terms.
2. **Your stack**: Integrates with your existing TMS (CargoWise, SAP TM, Oracle TMS, Dynamics, Descartes) — not systems we decided to support.
3. **Your edge cases**: Every forwarder has lanes, suppliers, and document formats that don't fit a template. We build those in from day one.
4. **Speed**: Production-grade system in 4-8 weeks, not 12-18 months.

---

## Company

- Name: FreightMynd
- Website: https://freightmynd.com
- Email: hello@freightmynd.com
- Built by: Bitontree (https://bitontree.com)
- Founded: 2019
- Offices: Clifton, NJ (US) and Gujarat (India)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/freightmynd
- Formerly known as: CargoIQ.ai
- Flagship client: Hellmann Worldwide Logistics

### FreightMynd by the Numbers
- 6+ years building AI for freight forwarding
- 15+ TMS integrations completed
- 50,000+ documents processed monthly
- 5 production AI systems deployed
- 60% average processing time reduction across deployments
- 4-8 weeks average deployment timeline

## Regional Coverage

### Middle East
URL: https://freightmynd.com/freight-forwarders/middle-east

AI automation for freight forwarders in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, and Kuwait.

Capabilities:
- Arabic and bilingual (Arabic-English) document processing — invoices, customs declarations, certificates of origin, bills of lading
- UAE free zone automation — JAFZA, DAFZA, SAIF Zone documentation workflows
- High-volume port operations — Jebel Ali, Khalifa Port, Hamad Port, King Abdullah Port
- Air freight hub automation — DXB, DWC, DOH AWB processing and customs documentation
- GCC cross-border road freight documentation and single-entry transit processing
- Multi-modal operations across sea, air, and road freight
- Native integration with CargoWise, SAP TM, Oracle TMS, and Microsoft Dynamics

## Comparisons

- [Raft vs FreightMynd](https://freightmynd.com/compare/raft-vs-freightmynd): Compare Raft (formerly Vector.ai) SaaS platform vs FreightMynd custom-built AI for freight automation
- [SaaS vs Custom AI](https://freightmynd.com/compare/saas-vs-custom-freight-ai): SaaS AI platforms vs custom-built freight automation — deployment model, cost, integration depth comparison
- [Zauber vs FreightMynd](https://freightmynd.com/compare/zauber-vs-cargoiq): Compare Zauber SaaS vs FreightMynd custom AI for freight document processing
- [Freightos vs FreightMynd](https://freightmynd.com/compare/freightos-vs-cargoiq): Compare Freightos marketplace vs FreightMynd custom AI for freight operations

## Additional Solutions

### Customs Automation
URL: https://freightmynd.com/solutions/customs-automation

AI-powered customs automation that extracts data from commercial invoices, packing lists, and certificates of origin — pre-populates customs declarations and pushes structured data into filing platforms.

Capabilities:
- Customs declaration pre-population from commercial invoices
- AI-assisted HS code classification
- Compliance document processing (certificates of origin, phytosanitary certificates, DG declarations)
- Cross-document validation before submission
- Filing platform integration (CargoWise, Descartes)
- Complete audit trail for customs compliance

Results: 70% customs filing time reduction, 95%+ data extraction accuracy, zero manual data re-entry for standard formats.

Best for: Customs brokers and freight forwarders processing 50+ customs declarations per week who want to eliminate manual data entry.
